Date: Thu Sep 20 08:53:45 2012

Log:
  - update to 1.5.1
  - remove local patch
  
  The only change in this release that it adds missing files to fix build.

  Submitted by:	rm (myself)
  Approved by:	Dmitry Pryadko <d.pryadko at rambler-co dot ru> (maintainer)

-PORTVERSION=	1.5
